exemplar.title: What role does  imagination play in producing knowledge  about the world?

detailedExemplarData.title: What role does  imagination play in producing knowledge  about the world?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with contextual details (Wright Flyer; Gobustan petroglyphs; Yeo portrait).
Consistent attempt to link each object to the prompt on imaginationâs role in producing knowledge.
Inclusion of TOK-relevant scholarship (e.g., Steven Mithen) and personal engagement that demonstrates imaginative knowledge construction.
Use of images and captions that anchor objects in their historical and cultural contexts.
weaknesses: Analytical links are uneven and occasionally drift into general admiration rather than precise TOK argumentation.
Heavy reliance on tertiary sources (Wikipedia, news articles) undermines evidential rigor.
Repetition of similar ideas about âseeing new possibilitiesâ without deepening the analysis.
Conclusion fails to explicitly reference the IA prompt and tie together the overarching argument.
Bibliography is inconsistent in style and lacks academic depth.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the 5â6 band descriptors by clearly identifying three specific objects and their contexts, offering explanations and justifications for their inclusion, and supporting most points with evidence. The student engages with TOK theory (Mithen) and personal reflection to illustrate imaginationâs role in knowledge production. However, the analysis is uneven: links to the prompt are at times broad assertions rather than focused arguments, and reliance on secondary sources limits scholarly rigour. Repetition of themes and a weak conclusion further prevent the work from reaching the 7â8 band. On balance, the workâs solid structure and clear context-setting justify placing it at the top of the 5â6 band with a final score of 6.

annotations.comment: The personal engagement with color symbolism is compelling and demonstrates imaginative knowledge construction.
The invocation of Steven Mithen provides theoretical grounding and shows engagement with TOKârelevant scholarship.
While personal reflection as a dancer adds voice, it does not clearly tie back to how imagination produces knowledge about the past.
Explicitly connect the ancestral art to the IA prompt by explaining how imaginative interpretation creates cultural knowledge.
Analysis hinges largely on BBC News; the student should consult art criticism or TOK texts to deepen the interpretation of symbols.
The exhibition prompt is prominently displayed, grounding the work in the chosen IA prompt and providing clear focus.
The exhibition opens abruptly. The student should add a concise introduction stating how they will address imaginationâs role and preview the three objects.
Consider adding a clear thesis statement after the prompt to articulate the overarching argument linking all three objects to the IA prompt.
The caption and image of the Wright Flyer provide strong historical specificity, situating Object 1 in its realâworld context.
The connection between observing birds and imagining flight is valid but too general. The student should tighten this link to show how imagination generates new aerodynamic principles.
Integrate a citation of the Wright brothersâ original patent or aerodynamic notes to substantiate claims, rather than relying on general descriptions.
The impact statement on societyâs imagination postâflight is a good step towards linking to broader knowledge production.
The discussion of technology advancing from bicycles to airplanes needs sourcing; without attribution, it lacks evidential rigor.
Reference primary engineering documents or peerâreviewed studies on early aerodynamics to bolster the claim that imagination guided technical solutions.
The header and image for Gobustan set the stage well with a clear realâworld site illustration.
The analysis of ritual dance in the caption halts midâthought, making the link to imagination feel incomplete.
Include archaeological journal references (e.g., Mithenâs work) directly alongside your interpretation of Gobustan to strengthen evidential support.
The portrait of King Charles is clearly contextualized with date and venue, anchoring Object 3 effectively.
Apply TOK concepts (e.g., shared vs. personal knowledge) when discussing the butterflyâs symbolism to sharpen the TOK angle.
The concluding paragraph reiterates prior points without explicitly referencing the IA prompt, weakening the overall justification.
Revise the conclusion to explicitly link back to âimaginationâs role in producing knowledgeâ to close the argument loop.
The bibliography relies heavily on Wikipedia and news sites, which limits academic rigour and TOK relevance.
Citation styles vary across entries (some italicized, others plain). Adopt a consistent style (APA or MLA) for clarity.
Replace tertiary sources with academic articles or TOK texts to strengthen the theoretical foundation of your analysis.
Ensure each reference includes full detailsâauthor, title, date, and publisherâto meet academic citation standards.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of

than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
